dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
Enterprise Kit
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
enterprise_kit
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
UIWindowScene
flutter
$(PRODUCT_MODULE_NAME).SceneDelegate
Main
LaunchScreen
Main
We need camera access to let you take photos, capture profile images, and scan documents directly in the app.
We need access to your photo library to let you select and upload images or documents.
We need permission to save photos and generated documents directly to your photo library.
We need microphone access to record audio messages and enable voice control features.
Your location is used to find nearby services, show delivery status, and provide location-based features.
We need location access even in the background to provide real-time alerts and delivery tracking alerts.
We need location access even in the background to provide real-time alerts and tracking features.
We need contact access to help you invite colleagues or share documents with contacts on your list.
We need access to your calendar to read and add bookings and check conflicts.
We need full access to your calendar to schedule appointments and view conflict checks.
We need calendar write access to add reminders and event bookings directly.
We need access to Bluetooth to connect to nearby support devices and accessories.
We need access to Bluetooth to search and discover nearby peripheral hardware and accessories.
We need speech recognition access to enable voice typing and speech command search features.
We need physical activity access to measure steps and track health/fitness metrics.
We use tracking to deliver personalized ads and content tailored to your preferences.
